name: Widget Title
helpText: Header title displayed at the top of the widget.

name: Days to Show (Rolling Window)
helpText: Rolling window size in days. Events outside this window are hidden.

name: Energy Unit
helpText: Unit label for energy lost values (e.g. MWh, kWh).

name: Accent Color
helpText: Override the border glow accent (CSS color, e.g. #06F5FF). Leave blank for default cyan.

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the dynamic card-level tooltip. Leave empty for auto-generated summary.

name: Enable Demo Data
hint: Show demo events when no real data is available. Disable for production.
